memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Isabella of Lennox (1376 -1458)
memoryArtifacts.description: Isabella of Lennox (d.1458) was the ruler of Lennox, from 1437–1458, and last in the line of Mormaers or Native Scottish rulers. As the wife of Murdoch Stewart, 2nd Duke of Albany (d.1425), she was al …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Isabella
memoryArtifacts.description: Isabella, countess of Albany and the daughter of the Eighth earl of Lennox was exiled to Inchmurrin Castle after 1425 when her husband, father and two sons were all executed on the same day at Stirlin …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella De Lennox於1376年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲時，她的父親Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox31歲，母親Helen Campbell20歲。她於1391年2月17日與Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾音姆連結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella De Lennox于1376年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲时，她的父亲Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox31岁，母亲Helen Campbell20岁。她于1391年2月17日与Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany在苏格兰登巴頓史爾音姆連结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰登巴頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella De Lennox was born in 1376, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, was 31 and her mother, Helen Campbell, was 20. She married Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany on 17 February 1391, in Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1458, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella De Lennox est née en 1376, à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Helen Campbell, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany le 17 février 1391, à Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1458, à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunbartonshire, Écosse.

de.Lennox Castle, Inchmurrin Island in Loch: The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella De Lennox 1376 in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox 31 und ihre Mutter Helen Campbell 20. Sie hat am 17. Februar 1391 in Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 82 Jahren in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunbartonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella De Lennox è nata il nel 1376 nel The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Helen Campbell, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany il 17 febbraio 1391, nel Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1458, nel The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella De Lennoxが1376年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennoxは31歳，母Helen Campbellは20歳であった。1391年2月17日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアインチムリンでMurdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albanyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスで82歳で死去し，スコットランドダンバートンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella De Lennox(이)가 1376년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1391년 2월 17일 스컷랜드 던바토실르 인ch머린에서 Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 던바토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella De Lennox nasceu em 1376, em The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Helen Campbell, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany em 17 de fevereiro de 1391, em Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1458, em The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella De Lennox родилась в 1376 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Helen Campbell, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany 17 февраля 1391 г. в местности инчмуррин, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1458 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella De Lennox nació en 1376, en The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Helen Campbell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany el 17 de febrero de 1391, en Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1458, en The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Dunbartonshire, Scotland.
